items.title: Wireless Festival cancelled after Kanye West blocked from coming to UK
items.dek: West was due to headline the festival in July but drew criticism over past antisemitic comments.
items.body: West was due to headline the festival in July but drew criticism over past antisemitic comments.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US journalist Shelly Kittleson to be released after kidnap in Iraq, militia says
items.dek: Kataib Hezbollah says the release comes on condition that she leave Iraq immediately.
items.body: Kataib Hezbollah says the release comes on condition that she leave Iraq immediately.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Tracking recent US-Israeli strikes on Iranian infrastructure
items.dek: Attacks have targeted bridges, steel plants and pharmaceutical facilities, verified videos show.
items.body: Attacks have targeted bridges, steel plants and pharmaceutical facilities, verified videos show.
